The Effective Date is April 2025 per the Fourth Amendment. 18 months = ~540 days is a reasonable derivation. Obligor is Tenant (Tenant must request). No termination consequence tied to this deadline. All elements supported.

The quoted text describes conditions Tenant must satisfy before Landlord pays the Renovation Improvement Allowance (i.e., Tenant completing Renovation Work), not a 'plan_approval' obligation of the Landlord. The 30-day period is Landlord's remittance of the allowance after receipt of documents, not plan approval. The claimed type (plan_approval) and obligor (landlord approving plans) mischaracterize the text. Section 10(E) approval is not the described obligation; the extracted formula (completion of Renovation Work + 30 days for plan approval) is not supported.
